# Suspicious Activity

If sign-in attempts from an unrecognised location are detected, the account is temporarily locked and a verification email is sent to the address on file. The lock clears as soon as the shopper confirms the activity through that email or resets the password from a trusted device.

[Source: account_security.md#suspicious-activity]
